series_metadata.series_description: Signature Authorizations maintained at The Ohio Department of Job and Family Services which designate specific employees to sign for the Director and or other Agency Officials.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 3 years from either the date the authorization/delegation is repealed, or, if needed for audit purposes, the date of submission of any quarterly, annual or final financial report, whichever date is later ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years from either the date the authorization/delegation is repealed, or, if needed for audit purposes, the date of submission of any quarterly, annual or final financial report, whichever date is later, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
